label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's tackle this question. The user is asking about the Black Creek Pioneer Village and which of the four options is true. I need to look back at the provided information to find the answer. First, I'll go through each option one by one. Option A says people can learn archery from coaches. The passage mentions Cosa Loma has an archery course, not Black Creek. So A is not correct. Option B talks about art exhibits and collections. The Art Gallery of Ontario is where the art exhibits are mentioned, so B is out. Option C suggests tourists can watch wild animals. The Toronto Zoo is the place with animals, so C isn't right either. Option D states the village features people dressed up for the 19th
